$comment: Recorded validation baselines. Single source for these numbers; SKILL.md points here rather than repeating them. Re-measure only from a clean tree at a known commit, and update measuredAtCommit in the same edit.
measuredInTree: primary redesign checkout at measuredAtCommit. Two documentation files were dirty from a concurrent session; nothing under src/, supabase/ or scripts/ was, so the code-facing checks measured this commit's source.

previousMeasurement.note: First measurement. Every value below was identical at both commits, so the re-measure confirmed no drift rather than replacing numbers.

context-maintenance.note: Compares the working tree against HEAD. On a clean tree it fails by design because no state-document or handoff edit is present. Run it once the documentation edits exist and before the commit; a clean-tree failure is not a broken baseline.
